programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Summer means food is plentiful and this year's youngsters must feed, grow and prepare to start life alone. For puffins it's a massive leap of faith as they jump from their cliff-top nests into the ocean.

programme.title: Atlantic: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: In the Atlantic's far north, autumn is the season of gales, cooling temperatures and driving rain. This is when the wildlife must make the final preparations for winter or migrate to warmer climes.

programme.title: Jaguarland
programme.desc: Explore a 400 square mile region of the Pantanal where jaguars rule and life follows the seasonal rhythm of the water.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: This episode follows the journeys of these magnificent humpbacks, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months, including incredible interactions with predatory killer whales. The humpbacks also face a world full of human threats, from large container ships, to the impact of seismic testing in the search for oil and gas, now threatening their very survival once more.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: Often referred to as the dinosaur fish, the coelacanth occupies a unique place in the fossil record, and when it was rediscovered almost a century ago it shook the scientific community. We follow its journey to the present day, accompanying WildOceans' scientists on an expedition to uncover more of their secrets and behaviours.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: In A 'Tale Of Two Sharks' we take a look at the incredible array of sharks found off the South African coast, focusing on the endangered Scalloped Hammerhead and the iconic Great White.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: This episode follows the journeys of these magnificent humpbacks, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months, including incredible interactions with predatory killer whales. The humpbacks also face a world full of human threats, from large container ships, to the impact of seismic testing in the search for oil and gas, now threatening their very survival once more.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Autumn is when stags compete to breed, osprey chicks begin a 3000-mile migration to West Africa, salmon return to the rivers where they were born and adders give birth to live young.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: The winter is mild and wet, which is good news for some but bad news for others. Red deer are forced to higher ground, salmon have gone six months without food, mountain hares turn a conspicuous white, and squirrels kick their own young out of the nest.

programme.title: Iceland: The Puffin Sanctuary
programme.desc: The endearing, "comical" puffin is Iceland's national emblem, but its fate is concerning. For a decade, couples have stopped breeding. A handful of local enthusiasts are now mobilized to save this beloved seabird.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: A true hidden gem of South Africa, the Garden Route is a 200km stretch of coastal highway known for its beguiling diversity and unparalleled spirit of wilderness.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren has arrived into Cape Town. This won’t be your average culinary exploration of a city; Warren has dedicated the entire episode to diving into a specific style of South African cooking known as ‘Cape Malay’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is in the Franschhoek Valley, exploring the endless bounty of Boschendal Wine Estate.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Continuing to listen to his heart, Warren deepens his love of wine by venturing to the lesser known town of Hermanus, where he’ll visit Newton Johnson, the ‘wine farm with a view’.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: Warren is heading out of Cape Town into the more quiet coastal area of the Western Cape, and the picturesque town of Paternoster. It’s here he’ll marvel at the seaside village feel and take an e-bike ride along the beach.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa S2
programme.desc: As the final stanza in Warren’s Food Trail of South Africa, he’s back in the bush, a quintessential part of all travel to the rainbow nation.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: With over 50 years in the industry, not many filmmakers can boast the longevity and influence of Steven Spielberg, whose journey from the suburbs of Arizona to the spotlight of Hollywood is one of the greatest stories ever told.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: 60 years since his directorial debut, Martin Scorsese's life has been dedicated to the past, present and future of cinema. Named Caretaker of Cinema, Martin Scorsese continues to push the boundaries of moviemaking.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: Since the early 1990s, Quentin Tarantino has been on a cinematic rollercoaster ride, that’s never looked like slowing down, that has cemented himself as one of the worlds most influential filmmakers.

programme.title: Iberia's Woodlands
programme.desc: Narrated by acclaimed English actor Bill Nighy, this blue-chip natural history series reveals the challenges faced by the astounding and rare creatures that make this unique environment their home.

programme.title: Iberia's Woodlands
programme.desc: Narrated by acclaimed English actor Bill Nighy, this blue-chip natural history series reveals the challenges faced by the astounding and rare creatures that make this unique environment their home.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: We follow Auckland Zoo’s bird team into the wilds of the Coromandel Ranges as they help to save native kiwi populations, It’s a feeding frenzy for the Tasmanian devils and the elephant team faces their biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, there's shocking news for the elephant team, the vets are concerned about one of their rescued Little penguins, and we find out how it really does take a community to feed the Zoo.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Ungulate team prepare for a birth, we meet one of the longest living animals and Auckland Zoo helps to save an endangered giant.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Baby Giraffe meets the herd, the Zoo’s five otter brothers are on the move and the ectotherm team search for a hidden for a treasure.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, it's an anxious time for Zoo vets as they work to save one of the most endangered birds on the planet, and the ectotherm team are on a mission in the wild South Island.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to the remote Atacama desert in Chile and to one of the most incredible and complex observatories on Earth - ALMA. He works alongside ALMA's expert team as they repair some of the world's biggest antennas.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: The worldwide pandemic ceased operations on the world's only underwater habitat. Mike Davidson joins a crack repair crew as they dive in to bring it back to life and get NASA astronauts back inside for training.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson joins the US Marines' 'Heavy Haulers' squadron as they're put to the test. They battle to keep their fleet of CH53 'Super Stallion' choppers flying, in preparation for intense warfare training exercises in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: In an effort to blend in with their surroundings, Krel engineers a device to get into the "mind-set" of humans and ends up discovering far more than he expected. Meanwhile, General Morando's bounty hunters close in on the Royals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! Cakey welcomes his Cousins to the dollhouse and leads them through a fun-filled itinerary of activities, but quickly realizes his cousins have an agenda of their own. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby and Pandy accidentally get turned teeny-tiny when one of Mercat's potions spills. To get back to their normal size, they need to find the right ingredients to make a grow potion, which means going on an itty-bitty search through the dollhouse! For our Cat of the Day segment, Mercat shows us how to make sparkly, mermaid slime.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: After fruitless searching the universe for Shiro, the Paladins struggle to accept that they must find a new pilot to join the team

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Mr. Pea helps the Veggies face their fears in an overnight boot camp/Bob and Petunia try to encourage Ichabeezer to stay when he wants to move out

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: LarryBoy and Junior No-pack must investigate when Junior's jetpack is missing/Bob gets jealous when Larry calls Bacon Bill his BFF

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus is having his first sleepover and Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever. / When Athena’s magical jump rope gets sucked up by the family’s new robot vacuum, she loses confidence in her abilities, only to learn that her real abilities are already inside her.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: The kids have a race to decide who gets to try some extremely rare berries. / When Scallop finds a beautiful and mysterious sea sculpture, she enlists the help of her friends to search the sea for the artist behind the masterpiece.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie struggles to recreate an old tradition perfectly, the kids realize they can make their own traditions./ A story told by Chef J inspires Juniper to go in search of snow.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Ty can't stop rolling after Skrap-It steals his master cylinder, so the Trux must quickly figure out a fix before he falls off the edge of a cliff

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky, Julian and Aunt Cora get swept away in Julian’s new hot air balloon and must fend for themselves in the wilderness

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Homesick, Cleo tries joining some school clubs to feel better. Her homesickness has an unexpected and destructive effect.

programme.title: Cleopatra in Space
programme.desc: Cleo’s over confidence gets her friends captured, and to rescue them she must convince a tribe of laidback aliens she can master their high values of humility, serenity, and caution.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and Thunk challenge each other in the first-ever dare-off, Thunk faces the deep end - his greatest fear; Grug picks a fight with the moon.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When snobby neighbors move in next door and complain about a bone pile blocking their backyard view, The Croods launch into the first-ever prank war.

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk
programme.desc: As an approaching storm threatens Berk, Hiccup must work fast to make peace between the food-providing farm animals and the dragons.

programme.title: Dragons: Riders of Berk
programme.desc: When Hiccup adopts a baby dragon that appears orphaned, Toothless becomes jealous and the baby dragon’s bereaved mother threatens the village.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and Toothless are captured and must find a way to escape the Dragon Fighting arena and survive an attack from the fearsome Triple Stryke dragon.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After the Riders save a Deathsong egg from the Dragon Hunters, they must take it back to Melody Island when the hatched baby won't stop crying.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss tries to rename the local soccer team to "The Babies", but after Danny gets involved in the popularity race with his name, "The Hot Dogs", the town becomes divided. Boss creates a crack team of Baby Corp employees to game plan solutions to the worst outcomes.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss arranges a sleepover with Quiet Psycho Baby to get access to her father the Mayor's day planner, hoping to plant his own pro-baby agenda. However, staying up all night has the unexpected consequence of delusional over-tiredness! Tim sneaks into an art film and decides he has to be a grown-up now, so Mom and Dad try to "kid" him up again.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Boss' reign as CEO is threatened by a charming, multiple-dimpled Outside Consultant Baby (OCB) hired by the Board of Directors. Boss, furious that OCB will ruin Baby Corp with his poorly thought out ideas, tries to distract him while Staci adds the finishing touches to a project that will make OCB unnecessary, The 24 Hour Diaper.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Hiccup and the Riders discover that Viggo is using two captured Catastrophic Quakens to build a dragon prison, they must help the dragons escape.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Dagur comes to Dragon's Edge looking for Heather, Hiccup tries to keep the two siblings apart by teaching Dagur the art of Dragon Riding.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When the Riders uncover the location of Viggo's Dragon Auction, they must stop him from selling dragons and stealing all the gold in Berk.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po discovers he was poisoned, he sets off to a caravan oasis in the hopes of finding out who the perpetrator is, unknowingly followed by the kid

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Po and the kids stop for the night at an Inn, they meet a gang who wants to fight Po and end up down a path to uncovering Jindiao's evil plan

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim undertakes his first Trollhunting mission by starting small: he must shrink down to eight inches tall to apprehend a mischievous gnome.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim and Toby investigate a Goblin attack, they discover Changelings are secretly living amongst them and rebuilding the Killahead Bridge!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Everything comes into perspective when Jim discovers his re-match with Draal is to the death.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: A theme park showcasing genetically-engineered dinosaurs turns into a nightmare for its tourists when one of the dinosaurs escapes its enclosure. An ex-military animal expert steps up to save the day.

programme.title: The Kingdom
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx leads an elite FBI team to hunt a terrorist in Saudi Arabia in The Kingdom—a tense clash of cultures and justice, directed by Peter Berg and produced by Michael Mann.

programme.title: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw team up to stop a superhuman villain with a deadly bio-weapon in this explosive Fast & Furious spin-off starring Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham, Idris Elba, and more.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante’s Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Backdraft
programme.desc: Two firefighter brothers clash while battling deadly arsons in Chicago. With explosive action and a gripping mystery, Backdraft stars Kurt Russell, William Baldwin, and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: Before Snow White, two queens clash in The Huntsman: Winter’s War. Love, betrayal, and war unfold as Huntsman Eric battles evil to save a kingdom from Ravenna’s dark reign.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger reprises his career-changing role as the Terminator in this explosive film that was selected as one of AFI’s Top Ten Sci-Fi films of all time.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Backdraft
programme.desc: Two firefighter brothers clash while battling deadly arsons in Chicago. With explosive action and a gripping mystery, Backdraft stars Kurt Russell, William Baldwin, and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family’s estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Gerard Butler and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau star as rival gods locked in an epic battle to decide the fate of the universe in this thrilling fantasy-adventure.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben’s gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: The Dragon King is locked in a seal by the Dragon Master for 500 years, and his daughter must travel back in time to 500 years ago to kill the Dragon Master, in order to reverse the act. Little did she know that the Dragon King and Dragon Master were close friends back then…

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Young Heroes of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: A drug cartel is entrenched in the Dong Zhou area. Mei Jing of the Thunderbolt Women’s Commando Unit, leads her team to attack the drug base, but they are being ambushed and the identity of Mei’s father as an undercover is exposed. After a fierce battle, Mei and her team manage to successfully defeat the drug cartel and rescue her father.

programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Food carving elevates delicacies to visual delights. From dragon made of carrot, taro and shrimps, to phoenix made of bottarga, Taiwanese Chef Liao Ching-chih morphs ingredients into flavorful spectacles.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: Girl in the Attic
programme.desc: To honour her mother's memory, Kelsey decides to run a marathon and shares her journey online to raise money. However, her public posts catch the attention of Billy, a seemingly unassuming store worker.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Everyone loves lasagna, and Rachael shares her tips for making a delicious, authentic dish made with egg pasta and guanciale, layered with marinara and béchamel sauce.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: Mikiko Terasaki of Sydney’s Omu restaurant shows off her technique in making omurice. Inspired by the visit from viral sensation Mikiko, contestants will have 75 minutes to create a dish featuring eggs.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars — no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: Taken in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Keisha is apprehensive about the team's next zombie, which may hurt the potential resale. Add to that a bad foundation and the discovery of termites, this potential flip seems more like a potential flop.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: A mystery box challenge with a saucy twist. The cooks must use at least one of six Asian sauces to cook a showstopping dish, with the bottom four headed for tomorrow’s pressure test.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation’s affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a hearty beef stew that is both versatile and delicious and serves it with her mother's famous "pucky huddle" potato fries.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: After dinner at the Luang Prabang Bamboo Restaurant, the Dokbakz head back to their accommodation, only to find that the entrance has turned into a flooded mess from the heavy rain.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses (S4)
programme.desc: The twins take on a makeover of a couple’s dated house. They update the '80s style kitchen and bathroom with an inexpensive farmhouse style.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: TheHotel (S1)
programme.desc: Chip and Jo focus on the public spaces with design elements in the restaurant, lobby, library and group suite that will invite and delight guests.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: TheHotel (S1)
programme.desc: Completed wallpaper and tile hint at the hotel's future grandeur as the project nears completion. Chip and Jo meet with the new general manager.

programme.title: Inside Out (S2)
programme.desc: Mike and Carmine look to make waves with their design choices and create a surf-inspired zen cottage.

programme.title: Inside Out (S2)
programme.desc: Mike and Carmine struggle to balance Katie and Michael's big goals for their home's interior and exterior.

programme.title: Building Outside the Lines (S1)
programme.desc: When a big beekeeping family request a stylish oasis, Cappie and Alex transform a truck’s concrete mixer into the ultimate "Beehive Bungalow."

programme.title: Flip or Flop (S4)
programme.desc: A potentially bad buy will need a lot of work to clear up known issues, but the exploding market could make the flip worth the risk.

programme.title: Renovation Wild (S1)
programme.desc: With only a month left before guests arrive, Grant and Lynsey begin their next renovation on the Family Suite at Old Mondoro and Tent Seven at Chiawa camp.

programme.title: House Hunters International (S189)
programme.desc: A couple leaves Detroit to provide their three boys with a new perspective on life in Iceland.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home (S6)
programme.desc: David helps a couple find a dream retirement home on the shores of Pamlico Sound in North Carolina.

programme.title: House Hunters International (S198)
programme.desc: A Marine who wears Hawaiian shirts and his newlywed pole-dancing wife are deployed with their 100-lb dog to Boblingen, Germany.

programme.title: Flip or Flop (S4)
programme.desc: A potentially bad buy will need a lot of work to clear up known issues, but the exploding market could make the flip worth the risk.

programme.title: House Hunters International (S122)
programme.desc: An accounting couple jumps at the opportunity to move to Amsterdam to gain a professional edge in their careers.

programme.title: House Hunters (S127)
programme.desc: A couple searches for a spacious home for their family of five in the pricey village of Floral Park, NY.

programme.title: Rock the Block (S6)
programme.desc: It's week three and the teams tackle their main suites and make massive moves as some desperately seek their first win of the competition.

programme.title: Renovation Wild (S1)
programme.desc: Grant and Lynsey still have to tackle the Safari Suite at Chiawa Camp in their final push to opening day. They have very little time left to pull it off.

programme.desc: Ali Khan grabs Georgia peach French toast, fried chicken and more in Athens, Georgia.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race (S18)
programme.desc: The final three teams undergo Tyler Florence's secret surveillance challenge in Newport News, VA, and the loser gets shut down for an hour.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out (S5)
programme.desc: Michael Symon amps up summer parties with some of his seasonal favorites!

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out (S5)
programme.desc: Michael Symon brings a flavorful fiesta to the table with his spicy and briny Grilled Oysters with Chorizo Butter, fresh Chile Lime Creamed Corn with Garden Tomatoes.

programme.title: Guy's Ultimate Game Night (S1)
programme.desc: Magic duo Penn and Teller appear in Guy Fieri's Flavortown Lounge to face off against personality extraordinaire Carson Kressley and comedian Matt Iseman.

programme.title: Chopped (S57)
programme.desc: Four lucky duck chefs are pumped to get a beautiful appetizer basket that includes delicious duck as an ingredient.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures (S2)
programme.desc: Celebrities and Food Network stars share their most decadent food finds.

programme.title: Guilty Pleasures (S2)
programme.desc: Food Network stars share their most indulgent guilty pleasures.

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks sends struggling chefs from restaurants across America on a gruelling boot camp to prove they deserve to keep running their kitchens.

programme.title: Inside Eats with Rhett & Link (S1)
programme.desc: Beyond Meat opens up its labs and innovation kitchen to Rhett and Link, who want to see if plant-based foods can eat like meat.

programme.title: I Hart Food (S1)
programme.desc: Hannah Hart goes to Portland, Maine, to sample fresh lobster prepared every way imaginable.

programme.title: Battle of the Decades (S1)
programme.desc: The chefs take on ingredients that go back to the 1970s! They’re challenged with using a fondue pot and later make their own version of chicken Kiev.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay serves the ultimate cocoa-filled brunch with items like Chocolate-Drizzled Scones.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's (S6)
programme.desc: Bobby Flay re-creates comfort food favorites for this whimsical and delicious brunch with an exciting menu of Churro French Toast,Cinnamon Bun Pancakes.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race (S18)
programme.desc: The final three teams undergo Tyler Florence's secret surveillance challenge in Newport News, VA, and the loser gets shut down for an hour.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: A set of replica Muppets has Chum feeling green with envy; but will going gonzo over these land him the goods? Meanwhile, Rick flips over an autograph book from the 1800s, but are the signatures the real?

programme.title: The Toys that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: The Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles high-kick their way into the action figure market in the late 1980s, opening the door for a new kind of martial arts toy. But their place at the top is soon challenged.

programme.title: The Food that Built the World (S4)
programme.desc: Two entrepreneurs rise from the ashes of Prohibition by staking everything on two liquors and go on to save an industry, change cocktail culture, and create two of the most popular brands in the country.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd (S2)
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, each designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were built to protect but lost to history. Did either exist, and if so, where could they be?

programme.title: The Pickers (S26)
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: The Food that Built Asia
programme.desc: The sushi episode delves into the story of one of Japan’s most popular dishes. The episode examines the history of sushi, from its humble beginning as a method of preserving fish.

programme.title: The Food that Built Asia
programme.desc: The episode examines the history of tempura from Nagasaki tempura, the prototype of today’s tempura derived from fritters brought to Japan by 16th-century Portuguese/Spanish traders and missionaries.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd (S2)
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.title: Holy Marvels with Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: In the Bible, there are two Arks, each designed by God himself. Both the Ark of the Covenant and Noah's Ark were built to protect but lost to history. Did either exist, and if so, where could they be?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: A set of replica Muppets has Chum feeling green with envy; but will going gonzo over these land him the goods? Meanwhile, Rick flips over an autograph book from the 1800s, but are the signatures the real?

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a daring prison break frees hundreds of Union soldiers. When he was captured and sent to Libby Prison in Richmond, Virginia, he engineered one of the greatest mass escapes in history.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed with Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Beneath the earth, and hidden in the depths of the sea, lie some of the deadliest discoveries of all time. From an asteroid impact that nearly ended life on Earth to creatures once thought to be myths.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: In July 1996, one of the worst aviation disasters in American history leaves 230 people dead and countless questions unanswered. It's a tragedy that changes the aviation industry forever.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: The history books say Adolf Hitler committed suicide in the final days of World War II, but not everyone believes there's sufficient proof. Did the Nazi leader die in Berlin, or was he able to escape?

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S16)
programme.desc: Puma Punku in Bolivia features some of the largest stone blocks on Earth, each carved with incredible precision. Could new technology solve an old puzzle—and offer proof of alien intervention on Earth?

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion (S3)
programme.desc: The clock is ticking with only days remaining in python season. Pickle seeks validation from Troy on her tracking skills. Bruce must hunt alone in Zak's absence.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Darrell Miklos and his team make a discovery far older than they expected. Later, new evidence emerges suggesting that the team may have uncovered a long-lost battle at Target 4.

programme.title: Lonely Eighteen
programme.desc: Set in the 1980s Hong Kong, Elaine and her best friend Ying enter the entertainment industry hoping to change their fates from poverty. Ying soon becomes a popular porn star but Elaine is lost between being her true self and an actress. When show business declines after a decade, their choices lead them to two different paths in life.

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master’s Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan’s daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan’s friend along the way.

programme.title: Ode to Gallantry
programme.desc: In this surprisingly light-hearted "Venoms" martial arts adventure, a lone wanderer is repeatedly mistaken for someone else and drawn into a number of violent battles.

programme.title: Tales of a Eunuch
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao enters the palace and unexpectedly befriends Emperor Kang Xi. At the same time, he is assigned by a revolutionary group to steal the valuable "Sutra of 42 Chapters," which Emperor Kang Xi himself is also seeking. Demonstrating keen intelligence, Xiao Bao deftly navigates between opposing factions and successfully evades danger.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: After many years as a respected actor and action choreographer, the Shaw Studio finally gave the dependable and commendable Hsu Hsia a chance to direct his own movies. He didn't waste the opportunity, inviting three other kung-fu designers to help on this fight-filled thriller. Wang Yu, co-star of such classics as Dirty Ho and The Kid With A Tattoo, here takes center stage as a young rascal caught between an anti-Ching Confederation and violent, vengeful Ching troops. But when he discovers that the good guys are led by master martial arts actor Jen Shih-kuan and the bad guys are led by the incredible Huang Cheng-li everyone knows that loads of great kung-fu is in store.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: The Viral Factor
programme.desc: IDC Agent Jon sustained grave injuries on a mission where the entire team was betrayed by their boss Sean. He accidentally got involved in a kidnapping case when he was in Malaysia to find his long lost brother, but finds out his brother is actually involved in the case and Sean is the mastermind behind it all!

programme.title: Shaolin Martial Arts
programme.desc: The Qing government assigns fighters to destroy Shaolin Temple and kill all the disciples, but two of them successfully escaped. They train under different masters and learn the Wing Chun and Hung Quan styles respectively, finally killing the fighters and taking revenge for the death of their fellow disciples.

programme.title: The Chinese Boxer
programme.desc: A Japanese karate master and Diao Er, who has been expelled from his martial arts school, return to the school to kill the school master and his disciples. After the massacre, disciple Lei Ming embarks on a vigorous training regime and vows to avenge their deaths. A fatal battle is about to begin…

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Young Long Jian Fei, a martial arts novice, is adopted by the Fire Spirit Demon who taught him the powerful Buddha's Palm, turning Long into a martial arts master. Long is tasked by the Fire Spirit Demon to takes revenge for his master, and this soon unleashes a storm upon the martial arts world…

programme.title: Shinjuku Incident
programme.desc: Illegal Chinese immigrant Steelhead and his comrades strive for survival in Tokyo, eventually forming a triad gang with Yakuza leader Eguchi in Shinjuku. Steelhead plans to retire after becoming a citizen, but when the police cracks down on the gang and with Eguchi planning to kill him, he is forced to return to the triad underworld.

programme.title: Swordsman and Enchantress
programme.desc: The story happens in a martial arts world where everyone tries to obtain the "Deer Sword". Lian's wife is wounded in an ambush and his rival Xiao saves her. They escape to Xiao’s home and he treats her poisonous wound. This leads Lian to suspect his wife’s faithfulness and results in several blood-splattering duels with Xiao.

programme.title: Sinister - The Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li’s wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li’s Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother’s death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

programme.title: The Moon Thieves
programme.desc: A crooked watch dealer assembles a daring crew - a thief, an explosive expert, a lock breaker and a watch connoisseur - to steal three luxury watches in Tokyo. Their mission takes an unexpected turn when they discover the legendary 'Moonwatch.' Pursued by the yakuza, the team must unite to navigate the chaos and pull off their high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Mistah
programme.desc: Real-life brothers Robin and Rustom Padilla topbilled this action epic about the Muslim conflict in the Southern part of the Philippines. Though diverse in outlook, they shared the belief that all Filipinos were brothers, whether they are Muslims or Christians, and hence, should not be at war with each other.

programme.title: Isla 2
programme.desc: Celso Ad Castillo once again directs with newcomer Via Veloso in the title role of Isla, the young girl who will do anything just to be able to escape her lustful adoptive father and the desolate island where she might spend her entire life.

programme.title: Madaling Mamatay, Mahirap Mabuhay
programme.desc: Ronnie played a disillusioned former military officer, who took the job of a school security chief to investigate the mysterious death of his best friend.

programme.title: Pikoy Goes To Malaysia
programme.desc: Tribal customs commands Pikoy to get married. But the union is against his will. He neglects his bride and humiliates his family. As punishment, he is banished from the tribe and forbidden to speak until he is ready to submit himself to the rules.

programme.title: Dapat ka Bang Mahalin?
programme.desc: The story, which was based on a popular comic’s serial, closely resembled what would later happen in real life to local moviedom's favorite couple. Sharon and Gabby portrayed teenagers who eloped and got married against the advice of everybody.

programme.title: Ang Pagbabalik Ni Pedro Penduko (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Pedro Penduko (Janno Gibbs) who was decreed by a hermit as the savior of the world, which was under an evil curse. To fulfill his destiny, he had to go back in time and fight with the malevolent pair from hell, Lucifero and Lucifera.

programme.title: Kapag Wala nang Batas
programme.desc: Gabriel (Chuck Perez) decides to enter the seminary to escape the violent world his family is involved with. But he soon realizes that he cannot totally breakout from his legacy.

programme.title: Chick Boy
programme.desc: Stars in this comedy about university students living in the fast lane though they cannot afford to. They find work as helpers to a rich woman with three beautiful nieces. Of course they turn on the charm for the girls and their aunt.

programme.title: Habang nasasaktan, Lalong Tumatapang
programme.desc: The dream of a beautiful future together by two orphans came crushing down when Mario was mistaken for a bank robber and was sent to jail.

programme.title: Indecent Professor
programme.desc: With cases of sexual harassment very much in the news, who could stop the wacky Leo Martinez from coming up with his own hilarious slant on the problem.

programme.title: Bikining Itim
programme.desc: Before Sally (Vivian Velez) leaves for Japan, she bequeaths Andoy (Joey Marquez) her black bikini to remind him of her absence, that is, in spite of his little dalliance with Tina (Cristina Gonzales).

programme.title: Init sa Magdamag (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a modern tale about woman. Her many moods. Her many faces. No matter who she was, happiness was not destined to be hers as all the events of her past eventually caught up with her.

programme.title: Topo-Topo Barega
programme.desc: Topo Topo Barega, an expression meaning "All for one, One for all." What each earns individually becomes the money of all. The problem of one worries the rest.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 6
programme.desc: Jess and her ride crew navigate the stunning but rugged Konkan Coast, switching between bikes and boats. The team race toward Mumbai, determined to get Pulak to the city in time to visit his family.

programme.desc: In Tasmania Kristy meets a couple of mates who harvest timber from drowned forest. In Derby, Halina goes on a mountain biking adventure. Craig meets entrepreneurs making the ancient Chinese spirit baijiu a best-selling drink.

programme.title: The World - Episode 69
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 89

programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.desc: Julia Zemiro explores Western Australia, uncovering the evolution of Wadjemup (Rottnest Island) from prison to tourist hotspot and Fremantle's transformation from a footnote in history to being in the global spotlight.

programme.title: Roads Unknown India - Episode 7
programme.desc: Jess and the team arrive in Mumbai, soaking in the city's vibrant culture. Split up along the way, they reunite in Jaisalmer where they experience quintessential Rajasthan riding across the iconic dunes of the Thar Desert.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Autumn: Coastal Succulents & Rustic Natives
programme.desc: Clarence creates a rustic native display, Guest Presenter Thanh bites into delectable dragon fruit, Josh meets a team of smart sniffer dogs that can detect plant disease, and Tammy finds clever plantings on a coastal terrace.

programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Mid-night Two
programme.desc: Yi Cheng and his friends venture into a haunted mountain that hides an ancient corpse and an eternal ghostly flame. No one who enters the mountain ever returns and at 2:30 AM, Yi Cheng’s friends vanish one by one. While searching for them in the eerie forest, Yi Cheng enters a realm of infinite reincarnation, facing a series of terrifying events…

programme.title: Korat Fight : The Dream
programme.desc: After being knocked out in a championship match, a Muay Thai fighter awakens in a surreal dreamscape born of her buried fears. Guided by a mysterious young man, she must battle inner demons through Korat-style Muay Thai. Her fight through illusions becomes a journey of self-discovery, confronting the darkness within to reclaim her true identity.

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Chris Turner sits for a high-stakes polygraph test in the hopes of ending suspicions surrounding the infamous 1984 murder of Catherine Fuller.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them. Stories of children who experienced the unthinkable: six girls hunted and murdered in their neighbourhoods; and more.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S4)
programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a brazen gunman shoots another man in front of gas station security cameras, and in Gwinnett County, detectives race to identify a woman shot on the side of the road and track down her killer.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Chris Turner sits for a high-stakes polygraph test in the hopes of ending suspicions surrounding the infamous 1984 murder of Catherine Fuller.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Kerry Lyn Dalton was sentenced to death for the torture and murder of Irene "Melanie" May. And because Melanie was a meth addict with no fixed address, police did little to investigate her disappearance.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Local code enforcement has warned John repeatedly about property violations. With the Hoarders team’s help, he must finally clean up or face enforcement action that could cost him everything.

programme.desc: During a road rage incident, Theodore Edgecomb shoots and kills immigration lawyer Jason Cleereman. Charging him with 1st-degree intentional homicide, the state contends it was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi?

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Amid the vibrant chaos of New Orleans' Mardi Gras celebrations, gunshots shatter the festive atmosphere of the French Quarter, leaving a man dead.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a senior citizen wields an unusual weapon—her mouth; a suspected criminal uses a local police station as a drive-thru; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Kelsey's family knew something was amiss when their usually responsible and responsive daughter didn't respond to their texts while out running an errand.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: When a young woman's body is pulled from the ocean off the Big Island, accusations threaten to destroy the local community. As tensions grow, a surprising discovery leads detectives to a devastating truth.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day in (S1)
programme.desc: A teen gets nabbed for being in the wrong place at the wrong time, while a man who left town with a warrant gets caught when he returns for his aunt's funeral and faces a one million dollar bail.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)

programme.title: ALS

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino

programme.title: Grade 5 Math

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'Enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ?
programme.desc: August 1988. Delphine, 9 years old, leaves with her brother for a scout camp near Deauville. Holidays that will quickly turn into a nightmare. One night, while she was supposed to be sleeping peacefully in her tent, Delphine disappeared. Her lifeless body would be found a few days later.

programme.title: Le Journal De La RTBF
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Outremer.Story
programme.desc: A journey a world away from the usual tourist hotspots for an immersive visit to Overseas France. Men and women, each treasuring a deep attachment to their land, act as our guides for this unique exploration of Overseas France and all the wealth of its culture, environment and heritage.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'Actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Chroniques D'En Haut
programme.desc: An ancient volcano with grandiose landscapes, Cantal reveals a raw and preserved nature, shaped by time and humans.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bien Bati
programme.desc: A businessman shows us around the Garneau saddle room, which he restored for the benefit of his home town. We also discover a windmill put back into use by the local community. And close-up look at a talented art carpenter.

programme.title: A Travers Champs
programme.desc: Community spirit has always been important in farming. It is alive today, especially among the new generation which prefers a farming model that is based more on cooperation than competition.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.
